title: Green Leaf Litter
description: Green Leaf Litter — Texture pack that changes the color of leaf litter from brown to green
body:
**Leaf Litter have been added to snapshot 25w02a. This texture pack changes the color of Leaf Litter from brown to green. Leaf Litter are less noticeable on the grass. This texture pack will only work on snapshot 25w02a and more. Have a good game!!**
## 1.21.5+

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f77362ca041d114dc44eebace51617bbe5e5daf_0.webp)
